executionAnchor.purpose: Prevent RFC documentation, issue, PR, and agent-context truth from drifting away from implementation-backed evidence.

policy.partialProgressRule: Partial RFC progress must be recorded as evidence on the issue without GitHub auto-close keywords. Issues close only when their complete evidence class and slice DoD are satisfied on main.

issues.closureInstruction: Keep #340 open until attested lotus-ai run evidence and model provenance exist for workflow output acceptance.
Keep #343 open until Lotus Idea PostgreSQL backup and disaster recovery readiness are defined and proven.
Keep #344 open until retention, legal-hold, and erasure lifecycle controls for Idea-owned records are defined and proven.
Keep #345 open until service SLOs, capacity budgets, and error-budget telemetry for Idea workflows are defined and proven.
Keep #375 open until protected migration execution and rollout evidence are provisioned.
Keep #379 open until live downstream persistence outcomes for Idea conversion and evidence handoffs are certified.
Keep #380 open until Idea data-product publication and supported-feature promotion are certified.

Closed #482 after PR #717 merged to exact Idea main 48cd175ffb18117e379ec698ca226fdaab1d88b5, Main Releasability 29944662113 and CodeQL 29944655544 passed, strict wiki parity confirmed no authored wiki drift, branch cleanup completed, and fresh Core-backed consumer proof on 2026-07-23 showed the supported empty PortfolioMaturitySummary:v1 window maps to no-opportunity while removing only opportunity_archetype_maturity_live_core_source_proof_missing.
Closed #542 after named OpenAPI modes across remaining multi-shape 2xx endpoints were certified.

Keep #675 open until Advise and Manage conversion realization is complete with live downstream proof.
Keep #676 open until Report, Render, and Archive evidence-pack materialization proof is complete.

Closed #688 after PR #714 merged to main, exact-main validation confirmed advise_live_contract_proof_missing was cleared by live Advise route-serving and accepted-receipt evidence, wiki parity was published, and branch cleanup completed.

Closed #689 after PR #721 merged to main at c884708285cf19d8862f8c360ea4130ffed375a3, exact-main Main Releasability run 29962877972 and CodeQL run 29962873603 passed, wiki source was published with strict DiffCount 0, branch cleanup completed, and aggregate readiness clears only manage_live_contract_proof_missing while action-register persistence, rebalance execution authority, source-temporal metadata, production identity, client-publication, and supported-feature blockers remain issue-linked.
Keep #690 open until live Report intake/materialization, Render output, Archive record, publication authority, and supported-feature promotion evidence exist.

Keep #691 open until Idea consumes Report live materialization plus Render/Archive owner evidence without overclaiming authority. Render owner proof is now available through lotus-render #65 / PR #67 at c608fe4c5b22fa22e51e242894a76a8532839e9f with Main Releasability run 29966168422. Archive owner proof is now available through lotus-archive #72 / PR #73 at 61ff2cb56a0e3652c40df2740f1f5d8150e52071 with Main Releasability run 29966167055. #691 remains open because #690 Report live intake/materialization, #380/#683 publication and supported-feature promotion, and broader Archive production trust/legal evidence in lotus-archive #55 are not complete.
